texto: It is not in giving life but in risking life that man is raised above the animal
autor: that is why superiority has been accorded in humanity no to the sex that brings forth but to that which kills.
explicacao: Citação de that is why superiority has been accorded in humanity no to the sex that brings forth but to that which kills. sobre sentido da existência e experiência vivida. “It is not in giving life but in risking life that man is raised above the animal” articula reflexao, simone-de-beauvoir, the-second-sex em registro de reflexao, com relevância para contextos como the-second-sex.
